item.title: 🇵🇰 Pakistan Oil Import Costs Surge 167% Since Iran War Began
item.description: Pakistan's oil import bill has jumped to $800M per week since the Iran conflict started, forcing emergency conservation measures and straining the economy.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iranian Parliament Speaker Says US Blockade Aims to Make Iran Collapse
item.description: Mohammad Baghir Ghalibaf, Iran's Parliamentary Speaker, claimed the US naval blockade of Iranian-linked ships through Hormuz is designed to make Iran "collapse from within."

item.title: 🇧🇾 Belarus Blocks Russian Conscripts From Leaving, Raising Risks for Ukrainians in Occupied Territories
item.description: Belarus has prohibited Russian conscripts from leaving the country, a move that raises concerns about mobilization and increases risks for Ukrainians in Russian-occupied areas.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Parliament Advances Reforms as Funding Deadlines Loom
item.description: Ukraine's parliament is slowly working through reforms tied to billions in funding from lenders, with deadlines still not met on over a dozen required measures.

item.title: 🇺🇸 MAGA Rift Deepens as Trump Faces Media Backlash Over Iran War
item.description: Prominent MAGA voices including Tucker Carlson and Megyn Kelly are breaking with Trump over his handling of the Iran war, signaling a growing divide within his base.

item.title: 🇬🇧 Trump says King Charles does not want Iran to have nuclear weapon
item.description: President Trump introduced the Middle East conflict into a White House state dinner for King Charles, saying the British monarch shares US concerns about Iran obtaining nuclear weapons.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Trump urges Iran to sign deal as US considers extending port blockade
item.description: President Trump discussed extending the US blockade of Iranian ports for months, urging Tehran to get smart and sign an agreement as the conflict drags on.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Putin accuses Ukraine of intensifying attacks on civilian targets
item.description: President Putin claimed Ukraine has stepped up attacks on civilian infrastructure in Russia, citing a drone strike on an oil refinery in the southern city of Tuapse.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel quietly expands military control zone in Gaza
item.description: New maps issued by Israel have expanded restricted areas in Gaza, putting thousands of displaced Palestinians inside boundaries the military says it can continue to change.

item.title: 🏛️ Fed chief nominee Warsh clears key Senate hurdle
item.description: Kevin Warsh, Trumps pick to lead the Federal Reserve, cleared a key procedural hurdle in the Senate, paving the way to succeed Jerome Powell next month.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇺🇦 US Ambassador to Ukraine Steps Down as Peace Talks Stall
item.description: Acting US Ambassador Julie Davis will retire and step down from her post in Kyiv amid a lull in US-brokered ceasefire talks to end Russia's invasion of Ukraine.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia Cancels Military Equipment at Victory Day Parade Citing Ukrainian Threat
item.description: Russia will hold a slimmed-down Victory Day parade on Red Square without tanks or missiles for the first time since the Ukraine war began, citing increased threat of Ukrainian attacks.

item.title: 🇺🇦💥 Ukraine Strikes Russian Oil Pumping Station 1,500 km Inside Russia
item.description: Ukrainian drones hit an oil pumping station near the Ural Mountains, 900 miles inside Russian territory, as Zelenskiy vows to continue extending the range of strikes.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚔️ Russia Attacks Odesa Port Infrastructure, Damages Hospital
item.description: Russian drone strikes hit port infrastructure in Ukraine's southern Odesa region, damaging residential buildings and a hospital, wounding two people.

item.title: 🇬🇧 London police declare Golders Green stabbing a terror incident
item.description: British counterterror police have formally classified the stabbing of two Jewish men in Londons Golders Green as a terrorism incident, escalating security concerns for the UK Jewish community.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Lebanon president demands Israel fully implement ceasefire before talks
item.description: President Joseph Aoun stated that Israel must fully implement the ceasefire agreement before any diplomatic negotiations can proceed, amid ongoing cross-border incidents.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Marines train to repel beach invaders in Philippines defense exercise
item.description: US Marines conducted joint exercises with Philippine forces to defend against simulated amphibious invasions, reinforcing regional military partnerships amid Indo-Pacific tensions.

item.title: 💰 US-Iran War Cost at $25 Billion So Far, Pentagon Official Tells Congress
item.description: A senior Pentagon official provided the first official cost estimate for the US war in Iran during congressional testimony, revealing $25 billion spent primarily on munitions. The disclosure comes as Defense Secretary Hegseth faces questioning about the conflict for the first time.

item.title: 🏛️ Supreme Court Strikes Down Louisiana Majority-Black District
item.description: The Supreme Court ruled 6-3 to invalidate Louisiana's second majority-Black congressional district, narrowing the scope of the Voting Rights Act. The decision could impact voting rights litigation nationwide ahead of the 2026 midterms.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇹🇼 Taiwan Tops Agenda for Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing
item.description: The upcoming Trump-Xi summit will focus heavily on Taiwan, with Beijing likely to make the issue central to the agenda. For Taiwan's 23 million people, this may be the most consequential diplomatic meeting of 2026—one they are not invited to attend.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU Loosens State Aid Rules as Iran War Drives Up Energy Costs
item.description: The European Union will allow governments to subsidize companies affected by soaring fuel and fertilizer prices triggered by the Iran war. The move reflects growing economic strain from the Middle East conflict on European industries.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Fed Expected to Hold Rates in Powell's Final Meeting as Chair
item.description: The Federal Reserve is expected to hold interest rates steady at what may be Jerome Powell's last policy meeting as chair. Kevin Warsh, Trump's nominee to replace Powell, cleared a key Senate committee hurdle on Wednesday.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iranian rial crashes to record low as economic strain deepens after war
item.description: Iran currency dropped to a record low of 1,810,000 rials to the US dollar as demand for foreign exchange that built up during six weeks of fighting flows into the open market under the ceasefire.

item.title: 🇦🇪 UAE exit from OPEC risks bitter price war and loss of cartel influence
item.description: UAE decision to leave OPEC on May 1 will sharply diminish the 65-year-old producer group influence over oil markets, opening door to all-out price war once Iran war ends.

item.title: 🇬🇧 Two stabbed in London Jewish neighborhood, PM condemns antisemitic attack
item.description: Two people were stabbed in Golders Green, a London neighborhood with large Jewish population, in what UK Prime Minister Starmer called an antisemitic attack amid rising tensions over Middle East war.
